PowerShell($src = "openspec\\changes\\add-youtube-attribution"; $target = "openspec\\changes\\archive\\2026-06-21-add-youtube-attribution"; if \(-not \(Test-Path "openspec\\changes\\archive"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "openspec\\changes\\archive" | Out-Null }; if \(Test-Path $target\) { Write-Output "ERROR: target exists" } else { Move-Item -Path $src -Destination $target; if \($?\) { Write-Output "Moved to $target" } })
